billing.title: Billing
billing.birrNotice: Ethiopian Birr prices are reviewed quarterly based on the NBE benchmark rate.

cash.instructions: Pay cash to your LIYA representative. Include your client ID ({tenantId}) as reference. Credit within 24h.

wave.instructions: Send the amount to LIYA's Wave number. Use your client ID ({tenantId}) as reference. Credit within 2h.

orange_money.instructions: Send the amount to LIYA's Orange Money number. Use your client ID ({tenantId}) as reference. Credit within 2h.

cashplus.instructions: Deposit to LIYA's CashPlus account: {{TODO: provided by user}}. Reference: {tenantId}. Credit within 24-48h after receipt.

wafacash.instructions: Transfer via Wafacash to LIYA's account. Contact your representative for details. Reference: {tenantId}.

d17.instructions: Deposit to LIYA's D17 (La Poste) account: {{TODO: provided by user}}. Reference: {tenantId}. Credit within 24-48h.

lapostepay.instructions: Pay via La Poste Pay to LIYA's account. Contact your representative for details. Reference: {tenantId}.

telebirr.instructions: Send to LIYA's Telebirr number: {{TODO: provided by user}}. Reference: {tenantId}. Credit within 24-48h.

cbe_birr.instructions: CBE Birr transfer to LIYA's account: {{TODO: provided by user}}. Reference: {tenantId}. Credit within 24-48h.

bank_transfer.instructions: Wire transfer to LIYA's bank account. Contact your representative for banking details. Reference: {tenantId}. Credit within 2-5 business days.
